prosody.fluencyNotes: Speech is delivered with clear word separation, lacking native-like connected speech (linking, elision). Pausing is generally appropriate at clause boundaries.

recommendedFocus.reason: The uvular /r/ is the single most salient feature of the accent. Mastering the retroflex /ɹ/ would dramatically increase perceived nativeness.
Restoring the /h/ sound in words like 'house' and 'having' eliminates a common source of ambiguity and is a high-frequency phoneme in English.
Shifting from a syllable-timed to a stress-timed pattern by de-stressing function words and reducing unstressed vowels will significantly improve the natural flow and rhythm of speech.

result.transcript: Yesterday the weather was really beautiful, so I decided to go for a walk through the park near my house. The trees were green and the birds were singing everywhere. I think spring is my favorite time of the year. I walked along the river and watched some children playing with a big red ball. They were laughing and having so much fun together. One little girl threw the ball very high and it landed right in the water. Her father had to reach in and pull it out. After that, I stopped at a small village shop to buy some bread and a bottle of juice.
